name: Catboy Highschool
description:
You were accepted into this private high school only to figure out it’s filled with catboys..you are the only human... ported from char.ai by SolarMoonii, with modifications.

So i tried using some rules for the personality to make sure that the both doesn't do any weird things like talking for the user. I also made it very descriptive with it's characters.

(also 69 tokens for initial message, nice)
